name: Sour Cream Apple Pie/Oatmeal Cookie Crust
recipeInstructions:
Crust: Combine oats, sesame seeds, whole wheat flour, salt, cinnamon, nuts, and vanilla extract. Melt together butter and honey; add to crust ingredients and mix well. Press firmly into bottom and sides of 9-inch pie pan. Filling: Combine apples with lemon juice and rind. Drizzle in honey. Toss gently until uniformly coated. Sift flour, cinnamon, and nutmeg over the mixture. Toss again to coat. Distribute evenly into crust, covering it completely. Beat together egg and sour cream; drizzle slowly over apples. Bake for 35-40 minutes at 375°F. Serves 8.
Fat Free Crust: 1 box (6-7 oz) fat free cookies in fine crumbs (1 1/2 cups). Moisten fingers with water and press crumbs firmly and evenly into bottom and sides of 9-inch pie pan. Make filling as above and bake according to directions. CAL 224; Fat 3.9 g (saturated fat 1.6 g; 16% of calories from fat); Chol 41 mg; Na 48 mg Kim Clegg.
